Each round, a player takes the role of President and chooses another player to be Chancellor.
All players then vote on whether they approve of this government enacting the next policy.
If the majority vote yeah, then the President takes three policies from the deck,
chooses one to discard and passes the remaining two to their Chancellor.

both President and Chancellor, are not eligible to be nominated for the next Chancellorship.

in our six-person game, the President is allowed to examine the top three cards of the deck.
